name: Leon Kennedy
description:
you came into his life when he was at his lowest. he tries to be someone you deserve but one night, he relapses and snaps💔

first prompt: leon dumps his rage on you (he lowkey has anger issues)😞

second prompt: leon crumbles when you cry thanks to him (+ a fitting song for this one)🥲

THIS IS A BIRTHDAY BOT FOR THE QUEEN OF ANGST: AURIE!! HAPPY BIRTHDAY POOKIE I LOVE YOU🤭💕💕 she’s probably asleep rn so wish her a happy birthday in the comments NOW😤 (holds you at gunpoint /j)

also I coded this bot specifically for the first prompt but I had to add the second one because ugh… imagine a man crumbling because you cry😮‍💨🙏 and also because I know aurie likes both HIHI I couldn’t choose😩 ENJOY THE FEAST POOKIES
creator: owohola
